---
title: "MIStatlE | AI Architect - 人工智能理论与代码"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header: assets/landing-head.html
    include-after-body: assets/landing-scripts.html
---
<canvas id="bg-canvas"></canvas>
<header class="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-md p-4 border-b border-white/10">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex justify-between items-center">
<a href="#hero" class="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-wider" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">MIStatlE</a>
<nav class="space-x-4 md:space-x-8 text-sm font-medium hidden sm:flex">
<a href="#learning" class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition">学习中心</a>
<a href="#research" class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition">理论研究</a>
<a href="#code" class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition">代码项目</a>
<a href="#reflections" class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition">个人思考</a>
<a href="#community" class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition">社群建立</a>
<a href="#contact" class="hover:text-cyan-400 transition">联系我</a>
</nav>
<a href="#contact" class="sm:hidden text-cyan-400">Menu</a>
</div>
</header>
<main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-16 relative z-10">
<section id="hero" class="text-center py-20 md:py-32">
<p class="text-xl uppercase tracking-widest mb-4 font-light text-cyan-400">MIStatlE's Lab | 未来算法家</p>
<h1 class="text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black mb-8 leading-tight"><span class="text-white">代码</span> 炼就 <br class="sm:hidden"><span class="bg-clip-text text-transparent" style="background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--primary-blue), #9F7AEA);">纯粹智能</span></h1>
<p class="text-xl max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-10 text-gray-400">AI 理论博士生 & 自媒体博主。探索智能的基石，编码未来的轮廓。</p>
<a href="#learning" class="neon-button inline-block bg-cyan-600/50 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-full border border-cyan-400 hover:bg-cyan-500/50">开启深度学习之旅 →</a>
</section>
<div class="section-divider"></div>
<section id="learning" class="py-16">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-12 text-center" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">学习中心：知识的提炼与重构</h2>
<div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
<div class="card-hover p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 space-y-4">
<h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-3 text-cyan-300">【课程笔记】深度学习数学基础</h3>
<p class="text-gray-400">整理并提炼博士课程中的核心概念：张量代数、变分法、矩阵微积分等。提供清爽的 Markdown 笔记和 Jupyter Notebooks。</p>
<a href="#" class="text-sm text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300">进入课程资料库 →</a>
</div>
<div class="card-hover p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 space-y-4">
<h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-3 text-cyan-300">【论文精选】经典与前沿解读</h3>
<p class="text-gray-400">每周一篇 A 级会议论文（ICLR/NeurIPS/ICML）深度解析。重点关注 Information Theory, Causal Inference 等领域。</p>
<a href="#" class="text-sm text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300">查看论文精选集 →</a>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="section-divider"></div>
<section id="research" class="py-16">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-12 text-center" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">理论研究：探索智能的基石</h2>
<div class="space-y-12">
<div class="bg-white/5 p-6 md:p-10 rounded-xl border border-white/10 card-hover">
<h3 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-3 text-cyan-300">拓扑数据分析与神经网络几何 (TDA &amp; NN Geometry)</h3>
<p class="text-lg mb-4 text-gray-300">利用代数拓扑工具（如持久同调）来理解神经网络内部的高维结构和决策边界。</p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm">
<span class="px-3 py-1 bg-cyan-600/30 text-cyan-200 rounded-full">博士课题核心</span>
<span class="px-3 py-1 bg-white/10 text-gray-300 rounded-full">Persistence Homology</span>
<span class="px-3 py-1 bg-white/10 text-gray-300 rounded-full">高维流形</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-white/5 p-6 md:p-10 rounded-xl border border-white/10 card-hover">
<h3 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-3 text-cyan-300">因果推断与结构学习 (Causal Inference &amp; Structure Learning)</h3>
<p class="text-lg mb-4 text-gray-300">超越相关性，构建能够进行反事实推理的 AI 系统。研究图神经网络中的因果结构发现。</p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm">
<span class="px-3 py-1 bg-cyan-600/30 text-cyan-200 rounded-full">前沿研究</span>
<span class="px-3 py-1 bg-white/10 text-gray-300 rounded-full">Do-calculus</span>
<span class="px-3 py-1 bg-white/10 text-gray-300 rounded-full">反事实推理</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="section-divider"></div>
<section id="code" class="py-16">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-12 text-center" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">代码项目：理论的优雅实现</h2>
<div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
<div class="rounded-xl p-6 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 space-y-4 card-hover">
<div class="text-2xl font-semibold flex items-center"><span class="text-purple-400 mr-3"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code-2"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"/><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"/><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"/></svg></span>Python TDA Library</div>
<p class="text-gray-400">一个用于拓扑数据分析的轻量级 Python 库，专注于提高计算效率和可视化能力。</p>
<div class="flex justify-between items-center">
<span class="text-sm text-yellow-400">Python / TDA / Vis</span>
<a href="#" class="text-sm text-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-300 transition flex items-center">查看 GitHub<svg class="w-4 h-4 ml-1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3"></path></svg></a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rounded-xl p-6 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 space-y-4 card-hover">
<div class="text-2xl font-semibold flex items-center"><span class="text-purple-400 mr-3"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-bot"><path d="M12 8V4H8"/><path d="M2 14c2.2 0 4-1.8 4-4V5c0-1.7 1.3-3 3-3h6c1.7 0 3 1.3 3 3v5c0 2.2 1.8 4 4 4"/><path d="M12 14v8"/><path d="M10 20h4"/></svg></span>AIGC Content Engine (MIStatlE Custom)</div>
<p class="text-gray-400">驱动自媒体内容的生成式模型工具包，实现快速创意迭代和多平台内容适配。</p>
<div class="flex justify-between items-center">
<span class="text-sm text-yellow-400">AIGC / Blog / JS</span>
<a href="#" class="text-sm text-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-300 transition flex items-center">查看项目<svg class="w-4 h-4 ml-1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3"></path></svg></a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="section-divider"></div>
<section id="reflections" class="py-16">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-12 text-center" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">个人思考：理想主义与探索的边界</h2>
<div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
<article class="p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 card-hover">
<p class="text-xs text-cyan-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">生活哲学</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-white">在博士的理想主义与现实压力之间</h3>
<p class="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">一篇关于学术生涯、自我成长与保持初心的随笔。给所有年轻探索者的信。</p>
<a href="#" class="text-sm text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300">阅读全文 →</a>
</article>
<article class="p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 card-hover">
<p class="text-xs text-cyan-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">思维漫谈</p>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-white">如果 AI 拥有意识，我们将如何定义“纯粹”？</h3>
<p class="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">一次关于人工智能哲学边界和伦理责任的开放式讨论。</p>
<a href="#" class="text-sm text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300">加入讨论 →</a>
</article>
</div>
</section>
<div class="section-divider"></div>
<section id="community" class="py-16 text-center">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-8" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">社群建立：聚集 MIStatlE 的同路人</h2>
<p class="text-xl max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-10 text-gray-400">我们相信开放、纯粹的知识交流才能推动真正的进步。加入我们的讨论组，共同探索 AI 的未来。</p>
<div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-center space-y-4 sm:space-y-0 sm:space-x-6">
<a href="#" class="neon-button inline-block bg-cyan-600/50 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-full border border-cyan-400 hover:bg-cyan-500/50">加入 MIStatlE 的技术交流群 (WeChat/Discord)</a>
<a href="#" class="neon-button inline-block bg-purple-600/50 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-full border border-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-500/50">订阅我的自媒体频道</a>
</div>
</section>
<div class="section-divider"></div>
<section id="contact" class="py-16 text-center">
<h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-6" style="color: var(--primary-blue);">连接 MIStatlE</h2>
<p class="text-xl max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-10 text-gray-400">无论是学术合作、技术交流，还是内容创作邀请，我都期待与志同道合的你建立联系。</p>
<div class="flex justify-center space-x-6 text-2xl">
<a href="#" class="text-white hover:text-cyan-400 transition" title="GitHub"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-github"><path d="M15 22v-4a4.8 4.8 0 0 0-1-3.5c3 0 6-2 6-5.5.08-1.25-.27-2.44-.78-3.5l-.23-1c.26-.47.28-.96.02-1.42A7.32 7.32 0 0 0 20 6.68a1.27 1.27 0 0 0-.01-.71 5 5 0 0 0-4.6-3.78 5.75 5.75 0 0 0-2.8 1.45L12 4.14 10.4 2.64A5.75 5.75 0 0 0 7.6 1.9a5 5 0 0 0-4.6 3.78 1.27 1.27 0 0 0-.01.71c-.34 1-.22 2.05.02 3.02l.23 1c-.5.44-1.2.78-1.57 1.35-.4.57-.48 1.23-.38 1.83.1 1.77 1.48 3.22 3.8 3.6a4.8 4.8 0 0 0-1 3.5v4"/><path d="M9 18a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2"/></svg></a>
<a href="mailto:your.email@example.com" class="text-white hover:text-cyan-400 transition" title="Email"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-mail"><rect width="20" height="16" x="2" y="4" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg></a>
<a href="#" class="text-white hover:text-cyan-400 transition" title="自媒体平台"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-megaphone"><path d="m14 11 3.33-3c.8-.8 1.2-1.8 1.2-2.9 0-2.8-2.2-5-5-5-1.1 0-2.1.4-2.9 1.2L5 8.33V20H2v-2c0-1.1.9-2 2-2h1c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V8.33l1.83-1.83a3.53 3.53 0 0 1 4.95-.12l4.95-4.95"/></svg></a>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<footer class="text-center py-8 border-t border-white/10 mt-16 text-gray-500 text-sm relative z-10">
<p class="mb-2">“理论是纯粹的理想，代码是实现的诗篇。”</p>
<p>&copy; 2024 MIStatlE AI Architect. All Rights Reserved. | Designed with <span style="color: var(--primary-blue);">Vision</span>.</p>
</footer>
